experience.title: Retail Operations Supervisor
responsibilities: Oversaw daily operations in a retail environment, ensuring compliance with company policies and safety protocols.
Trained and mentored a team of 15 sales associates, promoting a collaborative work culture.
Implemented inventory management systems, resulting in a 15% reduction in stock discrepancies.
Conducted sales forecasting and performance analysis to drive sales strategies.
Managed visual merchandising to enhance store presentation and customer experience.

experience.title: Assistant Store Manager
responsibilities: Assisted in managing daily store operations and staffing, reporting directly to the store manager.
Supported team leadership initiatives and contributed to staff training programs.
Maintained compliance with operational safety standards and company regulations.
Analyzed sales data and customer feedback to improve store performance.
